title: REFUGEE SERVICES - 211info
text: CATHOLIC CHARITIES REFUGEE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive services for newly arrived refugees, asylees, Special Immigrant Visa (SIV) holders, foreign born victims of trafficking, or Cuban/Haitian entrants. Program staff and community volunteers work to meet refugees' basic needs, including shelter, furnishings, food, and clothing. Case Managers facilitate referrals to other service providers and encourage refugee newcomers towards self-sufficiency through obtaining safe and secure housing, cultural orientation classes, applying for health insurance, employment services, English language classes, public assistance, and school enrollment. 2740 SE Powell Boulevard #5 Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Must have documentation present confirming their status (Refugee, Asylum-seeker, Asylee, SIV, foreign born victims of trafficking, or Cuban or Haitian entrant) and must have been in the US for less than 60 months from date of status granted. Most services can be rendered up to 2 years in total. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (971) 222-1883 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 222-1883 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on TriMet bus line 9 Powell Boulevard Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Immigration Issues Refugee Resettlement Services Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESS SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING TRANSITIONS PROGRAM LEGAL SERVICES - IMMIGRATION LEGAL SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CATHOLIC CHARITIES
